name: Data Persistence & Validation
description: The storage and integrity layer: file-based PRD adapter, schema validation, and the report command that surfaces store state.

riskMetrics.riskJustification: After pinning report.ts to rex-status-mcp-cli and cli-init.test.ts to cli-e2e-tests, remaining files (file-adapter.ts, validate.ts, store-contract.test.ts) form a cohesive persistence + validation cluster. High coupling reflects legitimate dependencies on schema types and the store interface contract.
